system.description: You can use an action to cause flames to spill out from your fingertip. Target one creature within 10 yards. Make a Will roll against the target’s Agility. On a success, the target takes @[2d6|d] damage, @[3d6|d] damage at level 3, or @[7d6] damage at level 7. On a critical success, the target also catches fire (luck ends). After you use this talent, a tongue of fire appears above the tip of your finger and remains for 1 minute. The fire sheds dim light.
